name: Dungeon Mayhem
description: Dungeon Mayhem is Wizards of the Coast's bite-sized D&D-flavored card brawler — pick a Barbarian, Wizard, Paladin, or Rogue, each with a 30-card deck of class-specific attacks, defenses, and signature spells, then bash, hex, smite, or stab your friends until only one stands. Ten minutes, one winner, lots of cackling. The micro version of every dungeon party night.
